title: Write a test suite hygiene checklist
prompt: Write `docs/test_hygiene_checklist.md` with a 10-item checklist for keeping an Elixir test suite healthy. Must include: (1) async: true by default; (2) explicit async: false requires a comment; (3) no Process.sleep; (4) unique test data via UUID; (5) start_supervised! for owned processes; (6) allow/3 for spawned children that can't be supervised; (7) sandbox plug at top of endpoint.ex; (8) Oban testing :manual or :inline — never drain_queue in sandbox; (9) on_exit never writes to DB; (10) reject seed-data-in-DataCase PRs.
